name: Annette Funicellos' Chopped Liver
recipeIngredient: 1 tbsp Chicken fat or peanut oil
recipeInstructions:
1. Bake chicken or calves liver until fairly well done.
2. Put through a meat grinder and chop into a paste.
3. Sauté onions in fat until brown.
4. Add the onion mixture to the liver paste.
5. Mix in the finely chopped hard-boiled eggs.
6. Season with salt and pepper to taste.
7. Serve with toast rounds, thin slices of rye bread, or potato chips.
